name: classic-vibe-mac
description: Compile a classic Mac OS app from C source and serve it running in the browser via GitHub Pages.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:c && npm run test:unit:js
scripts.test:unit:js: node tests/unit/preprocessor.test.mjs && node tests/unit/hfs-patcher.test.mjs && node tests/unit/shared-poller.test.mjs
